summary: Comprehensive testing of Takt Time industrial application completed. Backend APIs fully functional, core frontend features working, minor navigation issue with new line creation route.

ui_bugs.issue: Route /config/new gets stuck on loading screen ('Chargement...')
ui_bugs.workaround: Direct URL navigation to existing line config works fine

integration_issues.flow: New line creation via dashboard button
integration_issues.issue: Navigation from dashboard 'Nouvelle ligne' button to config page fails
integration_issues.workaround: Direct URL access to /config/{existing-id} works correctly

passed_tests: Dashboard loading and line card display
Form inputs and sliders in config
Navigation back to dashboard from config
Real-time status updates and WebSocket communication
Audio controls and sound alert configuration
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the navigation issue for new line creation route. The route /config/new is not loading properly and gets stuck on 'Chargement...' screen. Existing line editing works fine, suggesting the issue is specific to the 'new' route parameter handling.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality working, minor navigation issue with new line creation
